auth.passwordTooWeak: New password is too weak, please check password requirements
auth.fillAllFields: Please fill in all password fields

chat.title: AI Chat Assistant
chat.error: Failed to send, please try again
chat.confirmClearHistory: Are you sure you want to clear all chat history?
chat.startChatDescription: Send a message to start chatting with AI assistant and experience the charm of intelligent Q&A
chat.askAnything: You can ask any question, and I will do my best to help you
chat.aiDisclaimer: AI assistant may generate inaccurate information, please use the generated content with caution.
chat.inputPlaceholder: Type your message... (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line)
chat.sendError: Sorry, an error occurred while sending the message:
chat.responsesApiTooltip: Using OpenAI Responses API for stateful conversations
chat.suggestion1: Write a short story about a robot learning to paint
chat.suggestion2: Explain how async/await works in JavaScript
chat.suggestion3: Compare the pros and cons of React vs Vue
chat.suggestion4: Give me 5 creative project ideas for a weekend

settings.title: Settings
settings.resetSuccess: Reset successful! Cleared {{count}} provider's dynamic models
settings.resetModelsConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset all model lists to default? This will clear dynamically fetched models.
settings.userManagementDescription: Manage your account information and security settings
settings.pleaseLoginFirst: Please login first to manage user information
settings.selectModelsForChat: Select models to display in chat interface
settings.selectedModelsWillShow: Selected models will be displayed in the chat interface model selector
settings.languageNote: Interface language changes take effect immediately and are saved automatically.
settings.refreshAfterLanguageChange: Please refresh the page after changing language
settings.apiKeyMissing: API Key is required to save
settings.baseUrlMissing: Base URL is required to save
settings.resetModelsDesc: Clear all dynamically fetched models and restore the default code-preset model list. This action cannot be undone.
settings.confirmResetMessage: Are you sure you want to reset all models? This will delete all dynamically fetched models and restore the default model list from code presets.
settings.resetComplete: Reset complete, page will refresh shortly...
settings.testModelHelp: This model is only used for testing the connection, it does not affect the default model setting. If not selected, the default model will be used for testing.
settings.featureNotSupported: This feature is not supported yet
settings.modelVisibilityHelp: Checked models will appear in the model selector on the homepage, unchecked models will be hidden
settings.responsesApiTestMessage: Hello! This is a Responses API test.
settings.cacheManagementDesc: Manage application cache and local storage data
settings.cacheWarningText: Clearing cache will delete locally stored data, please proceed with caution. For a complete data wipe, please log out first and clean up from the login page.
settings.normalClearTooltipContent: Settings page tab state, temporary cache data, debug and development data, expired timestamp data
settings.normalClearTooltipRetained: Conversation history, model selection, AI parameters, login status, language settings
settings.normalClearDesc: Clear temporary data and UI state without affecting conversation history, model selection, and other important configurations.
settings.deepClearTooltipContent: Conversation history, model selection, AI parameters, theme settings, settings page tab state, all temporary and cache data
settings.deepClearTooltipWarning: Note: Almost everything will need to be reconfigured
settings.deepClearDesc: Clear conversation history, model selection, AI parameters and all user data, retaining login status and language settings.
settings.deepClearSuccess: Deep cache cleared! Page will reload.
settings.deepClearPartial: Deep cache cleared! Success: {{success}}, Failed: {{failed}}. Page will reload.

parameters.title: Parameters
parameters.aiWillDecideLength: AI will intelligently decide output length based on question complexity, no upper limit
parameters.creativityDesc: Control the randomness and innovation level of responses
parameters.outputLengthDesc: When enabled, AI can generate any length as needed; when disabled, set maximum token count
parameters.diversityDesc: Control the diversity of vocabulary selection
parameters.canUseWithTemperature: Can be used together with Temperature
parameters.claudeWarning: Claude recommends adjusting only Temperature or TopP, not both simultaneously
parameters.webSearchDesc: Fetch real-time information from the web
parameters.researchTip: Tip: Enable all tools for best research results
